evidences.title: Usher Drops Apple Music Super Bowl LVIII Halftime Show Teaser
evidences.content: The song that topped the Billboard Hot 100 for 12 consecutive weeks in 2004 bubbles up and gets reworked by a marching band, subway flutist, teenage string quartet, late night diner beatbox crew, pianist and pal J Balvin — who recreates the famous oven door meme — amid footage of Ush killing it on stage. Another friend, BTS singer and “Standing Next To You” collaborator Jung Kook makes a brief cameo, along with NBA superstar LeBron James, who also can’t help singing along to the hit’s indelible chorus. The clip ends with Usher, 45, standing against a red background wearing shades and an open-to-the-navel black shirt and matching gloves as he swings his signature U pendant around his neck framed by the words “One performance. 30 years in the making.” [...] Jelly Roll and Shaboozey perform at the T-Mobile Mane Stage during the 2025 Stagecoach Festival on April 26, 2025 in Indio, California. ### No. 1 Gets an 'Amen': Shaboozey & Jelly Roll Rule Country Airplay Chart After a woman says “take that and rewind it back,” the camera rolls into the past to 1998, after Usher’s second album, 1997’s My Way, blew the singer up into a global superstar thanks to such hits as “You Make Me Wanna…...

evidences.title: ‎USHER's Super Bowl LVIII Halftime Show Set List - Apple Music
evidences.content: It’s not every day that JAŸ-Z calls and asks you to headline the Super Bowl. When USHER got the call, Hov used three little words: “It’s magic time.” And it was. The R&B icon says he always felt destined for the biggest stage in entertainment, and his recent—and wildly successful—Las Vegas residency was in many ways the perfect boot camp. “Everything led up to this moment,” he told Zane Lowe during an interview celebrating the halftime show’s announcement. “Vegas has always been a place where entertainers find passion and connection [with] their fans. So for the Super Bowl to have made its way to Las Vegas… Wow.” Few R&B artists have ever held this honor, and USHER has found himself in excellent company (among his forebears are Michael Jackson and Prince). “I’m happy to join a shortlist [...] Michael Jackson and Prince). “I’m happy to join a shortlist of legacy artists from my genre who deserve this moment, and that JAŸ-Z and Roc Nation made certain the entire world understands our culture, understands where we come from, understands entertainment the way that they do.” Revisit the songs USHER performed at his instantly iconic halftime show. evidences.title: Usher's Super Bowl Halftime show cemented his R&B legacy - NPR
evidences.content: What followed was essentially a montage of his immersive catalog that at times whipped by too quickly – a single line from "Superstar" here, a very short taste of "Nice and Slow" there. The medley was at its best when he gave us a bit of time to revel in his smooth, swaggering choreography and sit with a song for a bit, as he did with his classic ballad "U Got It Bad." (This was the moment he stripped off his shirt, the vocals got a chance to shine, and he brought out H.E.R. to shred on the guitar solo. Magic.) Usher and Alicia Keys perform "My Boo" during Super Bowl LVIII. TIMOTHY A. CLARY/AFP via Getty Images hide caption Usher and Alicia Keys perform "My Boo" during Super Bowl LVIII. [...] As was previously reported, some of Usher's notable collaborators were also on deck to showcase his bona fides. Alicia Keys, performing a bit of her solo hit "If I Ain't Got You" and their duet "My Boo"; Jermaine Dupri for "Confessions (Part II)"; Will.I.Am for "OMG"; Lil Jon and Ludacris for "Yeah," the obvious choice for the final song. [...] The "rated U" performance (per Apple Music) was, admittedly, chaotic and hurried for most of its runtime. The opening song, "Caught Up," found him e...

She made her entrance with rendition of her 2003 hit "If I Ain't Got You," clad in a red rhinestone jumpsuit while playing a matching scarlet piano. The two then broke out into their chart topper, "My Boo," which is currently celebrating its 20-year anniversary after the stars first release it in 2004. The track 2024 was a Billboard Hot 100 number-one hit and won a Grammy for Best R&B Performance by a Duo or Group with Vocals. Check out the post on X Their reunion included a much-talked about moment where Usher embraced a charmed Keys. The two have clear chemistry, but it's all platonic. Usher has a longtime girlfriend, Jen Goicoechea, while Keys has been married to music producer Swizz Beats for 14 years. evidences.title: Every song on Usher's setlist for the Super Bowl halftime show
evidences.content: Save Saved Read in app This story is available exclusively to Business Insider subscribers. Become an Insider and start reading now. Have an account? . Usher headlined the 2024 Super Bowl halftime show on Sunday. He kicked off the performance with his 2005 single "Caught Up." He also performed smash hits like "My Boo" with Alicia Keys, "OMG," and "Yeah!" Usher took the stage at the Super Bowl on Sunday to deliver a medley of hits. His halftime show comes on the heels of his popular Las Vegas residency, which wrapped its 100-show run in December. He also released his ninth studio album, "Coming Home," on Friday. II" was released as a single in 2004. Usher/YouTube "Confessions Part II" was released as the third single from "Confessions." evidences.title: Usher's Super Bowl Setlist and Special Guests, Discussed | TIME
evidences.content: “Usher will perform ‘OMG,’ ‘Yeah!’ ‘You Don’t Have To Call’ ‘Caught Up,’ and ‘My Way,’" said one self–assured fan. “Songs that I know Usher will NOT be performing: ‘I Need a Girl,’ ‘Same Girl,’ ‘Daddy’s Home’ with the Plies verse, and 'Love in the Club,'” another social media user said. “He WILL perform: ‘Good, Good,’ ‘Yeah!’ ‘OMG,’ and ‘DJ Got Us Fallin' In Love.’" Advertisement There’s also an ongoing debate as to whether Usher should include his 2010 hit “OMG” in the setlist. “Usher better not perform OMG [on] Sunday,” one fan wrote. While another commented, via an X post which has so far been viewed over 2.6 million times and has received 80k likes, “I didn’t realize so many ppl hated ‘OMG’ by Usher.” They went on to admit they enjoy dancing to the seemingly divisive track. [...] # Fans Are Convinced They've Figured Out Usher's Super Bowl Setlist and Special Guests Show me more content from TIME on Google Search Olivia-Anne Cleary Cleary is an editor at TIME, based in the London bureau. evidences.title: Usher's Super Bowl Halftime Show Music List | EBONY
evidences.content: As anticipation builds for the halftime show, speculation swirls about potential special guests. With collaborators like Lil Jon, Ludacris, Alicia Keys, Jeezy and longtime producer Jermaine Dupri, the stage could see some exciting surprises. Reflecting on last year’s performance, such as Rihanna's 12-song medley, fans eagerly anticipate which of Usher's hits spanning from his "My Way" era through "8701," "Confessions," and beyond will grace the stage during his 15-minute set. Here’s how Usher’s setlist will go: # "Caught Up" # “U Don’t Have To Call” # “My Way” # “U Make Me Wanna” # “U Remind Me” # “Burn” # “Love in This Club” # “Confessions” / “Confessions Part II” # “My Boo” # “OMG” # “DJ Got Us Fallin’ In Love” # “Yeah” [...] Usher is set to take the stage at the Super Bowl LVIII this Sunday, transforming the event into what could easily be dubbed the Usher concert. As an iconic figure in R&B, Usher has been the soundtrack to countless lives, and this performance marks a major milestone in his career. While he previously made a guest appearance at Super Bowl XLV alongside the Black Eyed Peas, he's headlining the show himself his year while fresh off his three-year residency to...

evidences.title: Usher shines at star-studded 2024 Super Bowl halftime show
evidences.content: # Usher shines at star-studded 2024 Super Bowl halftime show Usher performs during halftime of the NFL Super Bowl 58 football game Sunday, Feb. 11, 2024, in Las Vegas. (Steve Luciano/AP) LOS ANGELES (AP) — Usher emerged at Las Vegas' Allegiant Stadium for the 2024 Super Bowl halftime show seated on a throne, joined by a marching band and a trove of Vegas performers — but stayed its center. It was an immediate confirmation of his position as the ideal halftime performer: one with timeless, well-known hits, masterful choreography, and a devoted audience. He started with “Caught Up," moving into “U Don't Have to Call," Superstar," and “Love in the Club.” [...] His album “Confessions” ranks among one of the best-selling music projects of all time and turned 20 this year; “Burn” became an easy performance highlight. Over the past two years, Usher, 45, has made Vegas a home for his unique talents, with his sold-out residency, “Usher: My Way," at Dolby Live at Park MGM making him the perfect pick for Sunday's game. The eight-time Grammy award winner is also no stranger to the Super Bowl stage — he made a guest appearance with Black Eyed Peas frontman will.i.am in 2011. “I got a chance...

evidences.title: What Usher's Super Bowl Halftime Show Setlist Should Be - VIBE.com
evidences.content: On Sunday, Feb. 11, a nine-figure audience will tune in for Usher ashe aims to bring “real R&B” to the world’s biggest stage—not just R&B music, but “R&B performance, R&B connection, R&B spirit,”— two days after the debut of his highly-anticipated new album, Coming Home. Of course, it’s a near-impossible task to condense his incomparable discography, and roughly three-hour residency into a 15-minute set. We know this and don’t mind doing the leg work of piecing together the perfect Super Bowl Halftime Show setlist. Here’s how we imagine it all going down: ## “Hey Daddy (Daddy’s Home)” Usher setlist Usher setlist [...] ## “Good Kisser” Usher setlist Usher setlist When he gets to the top of the chorus with “Ladies, can I put this love up on you one time?,” the lights switch to a red hue as a female dancer entices him with a playful, silent skit. The drums kick in from “Good Kisser” and Usher focuses his attention on her as he sings the hook. This sultry moment leads to the crooner finally losing his shirt— no Usher show is complete if he doesn’t end up half naked at some point. ## “You Make Me Wanna” Usher setlist Usher setlist She guides him to a seat and subtly leaves the stage...

evidences.title: Usher's Super Bowl Halftime show cemented his R&B legacy - NPR
evidences.content: NPR logo NPR Music NPR Music ## Super Bowl 2024 # Usher's Super Bowl Halftime show was chaotic but cemented his R&B legacy Aisha Harris headshot Aisha Harris Usher performs onstage during the Apple Music Super Bowl LVIII Halftime Show at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas, Nevada. Jamie Squire/Getty Images hide caption Usher performs onstage during the Apple Music Super Bowl LVIII Halftime Show at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas, Nevada. Going into the Super Bowl Halftime Show, Usher didn't really have anything to prove – in a career that's going on three decades, he's managed to cultivate a significant amount of good will and, in recent years, a resurgence in cultural relevancy, thanks to a hugely successful grown and sexy Las Vegas residency. (And a very viral lo-fi moment.) [...] Usher: Tiny Desk Concert ### Tiny Desk ### Usher: Tiny Desk Concert Nevertheless, getting to headline the event can be akin to earning an EGOT for any pop superstar, and on Sunday evening, Usher approached it as a hard-earned capstone to his legacy. "They said I wouldn't make it, they said I wouldn't be here today, but I am," he pronounced early into his ebullient set, before shouting out his mother. For...

When USHER got the call, Hov used three little words: “It’s magic time.” And it was. The R&B icon says he always felt destined for the biggest stage in entertainment, and his recent—and wildly successful—Las Vegas residency was in many ways the perfect boot camp. “Everything led up to this moment,” he told Zane Lowe during an interview celebrating the halftime show’s announcement. “Vegas has always been a place where entertainers find passion and connection [with] their fans. So for the Super Bowl to have made its way to Las Vegas… Wow.” Few R&B artists have ever held t...
